## Meeting Purpose

[Sync meeting to discuss progress, provide guidance, and plan next steps for the content creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on high-priority topics like hiring, HR, and payroll for the client](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Cluster keywords into themes/categories and associate assignments with themes](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Leverage AI for research and understanding technical concepts](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Develop a content QA checklist to maintain quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Plan to automate processes and bring in specialized team members as the workload increases](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

## Topics

### Content Prioritization and Organization

  - [Client's current priorities are hiring, HR, and payroll topics aligned with their product categories](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Cluster keywords into parent themes/categories based on search volume and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Associate writing assignments with specific themes for better alignment](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Utilize metadata like product categories, personas, etc. to tag and organize content](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Research and Understanding Technical Concepts

  - [Use AI tools like Anthropic to understand complex topics like graph databases](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Identify competing sources creating similar content for the target audience](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Create educational content explaining core concepts from a beginner's perspective](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Bring in technical reviewers/writers for in-depth, specialized content as needed](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

### Quality Assurance and Processes

  - [Develop a comprehensive content QA checklist (broken links, fact-checking, legal mentions, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Prioritize critical checks with the client for the initial phase](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Plan to enrich articles with human voice, quotes, examples in later phases](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Automate repetitive tasks and delegate to virtual assistants as the team grows](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Team Expansion and Specialization

  - [Onboard a second writer soon, potentially a third client as well](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Have team members specialize in different areas (e.g., prompt engineering, technical SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Sadira to become an expert in using Airtable for content organization](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Manage and delegate tasks to virtual assistants in the future](https://fathom.video/share/kSURB363TvxzEC6F1SpYJtcpHnDDfcKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
